channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Seth Meyers Predicts Trump Would Use Alien Life Announcement as Distraction from Epstein Files
item.description: Seth Meyers, in a July episode of 'Late Night with Seth Meyers', predicted that Donald Trump would announce the existence of extraterrestrial life to distract from the ongoing controversy surrounding ...

item.title: Rothschilds’ Connections in the Epstein Files Revealed
item.description: The Epstein Files, officially released by the U.S. Department of Justice in January 2026, contain 3.8 million pages with the name 'Rothschild' appearing nearly 12,000 times. Emails and contracts show ...

item.title: Russia warns of consequences if U.S. ends nuclear test moratorium
item.description: Three weeks after the expiration of the last major nuclear arms control treaty between the United States and Russia, tensions between the two powers have escalated. Speaking at the Geneva Disarmament ...

item.title: US Presses Iran to Dismantle Key Nuclear Facilities and Transfer Uranium in Geneva Talks
item.description: During the third round of indirect nuclear negotiations in Geneva, the United States reportedly demanded that Iran dismantle its primary nuclear facilities and transfer its entire stockpile of enriche...

item.title: Death of Blind Rohingya Refugee in Buffalo Raises Questions Over Border Patrol Release Procedures
item.description: A 56-year-old Rohingya refugee, Nurul Amin Shah Alam, was found dead on a street in Buffalo, New York, after being released by US Border Patrol approximately eight kilometres from his home in sub-zero...

item.title: I Exposed New Jersey's Jewish Invasion...
item.description: The video presents a highly controversial and likely unfounded claim of a 'Jewish invasion' of New Jersey, alleging secret land acquisitions and control by Jewish individuals and organizations. It use...

item.title: Hillary Clinton pauses Epstein deposition after photo leak during closed-door session

item.title: Robert DeNiro Expresses Emotional Criticism of Donald Trump on Podcast
item.description: During a recent appearance on The Best People podcast, actor Robert DeNiro became emotional while discussing his concerns about former President Donald Trump. The 82-year-old actor, known for his role...

item.title: A Critical Review of Lluís Montoliu’s Book on Scientific Vocation and Career Paths in Spain
item.description: This article offers a detailed reflection on the book “Ser científico: la ciencia como vocación y profesión” by Lluís Montoliu, portraying it as both an autobiographical account and a practical guide ...

item.title: Kim Scott Arrested in Michigan on DUI and Hit-and-Run Charges, Bodycam Footage Released
item.description: Kim Scott, the former wife of rapper Eminem, was arrested in Michigan last week on suspicion of driving under the influence, according to reports and recently released body camera footage. The footage...

item.title: Cigarette Sales and Smoking Practices in U.S. Hospitals During the 1950s
item.description: The article explores a little-known but once common practice in American hospitals during the 1950s: the routine sale and widespread use of cigarettes within medical facilities. At the time, tobacco c...

item.title: Ukrainian Air Force and SBU Officials Detained for Bribery in Aircraft Shelter Project
item.description: Ukrainian law enforcement has detained the logistics commander of the Air Force, Colonel Andrii Ukrainets, and the head of the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU) department in Zhytomyr, Volodymyr Kompa...

item.title: DNA-Inspired Molecular System Advances Solar Thermal Energy Storage
item.description: Researchers from the University of California, Santa Barbara and UCLA have developed a new molecular solar thermal (MOST) energy storage system inspired by DNA photochemistry. The system is based on a...

item.title: Meta AI director experiences unintended email deletion due to OpenClaw AI
item.description: OpenClaw, an open-source AI agent capable of automating tasks across multiple services, caused a significant mishap for Summer Yue, Meta Superintelligence Labs' Director of Alignment. While running Op...

item.title: US Energy Secretary Criticizes EU Plans to Reduce Dependence on American LNG
item.description: U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright criticized the European Union’s stated intention to reduce its reliance on American liquefied natural gas (LNG), calling the remarks “very unfortunate.” His comments...

item.title: Israeli Officials Managed Security Systems at Epstein’s Manhattan Residence
item.description: In early 2016, Israeli government officials installed security equipment and alarm systems at Jeffrey Epstein’s Manhattan residence and monitored building access. The permanent mission of Israel to th...

item.title: Critics Highlight Western Residences of Iranian Officials’ Children Amid Domestic Repression
item.description: Opposition activists and analysts have accused senior figures within Iran’s ruling establishment of hypocrisy, alleging that many top officials use state resources to support their children’s lives in...

item.title: A Complete Guide to Choosing the Right Gutter Style for Your Home
item.description: Selecting the right gutter system is essential not only for aesthetics but also for protecting a home from water damage. Homeowners should start by evaluating their roof’s shape, pitch, and fascia dim...

item.title: Chris Hemsworth Reflects on Moving Back to Australia for Family Life
item.description: Chris Hemsworth has described relocating from Los Angeles to Australia as the best decision for his family. Speaking on the Smartless podcast, he explained that the move coincided with the birth of hi...

item.title: New Rogue One Prequel Comics to Explore Characters from the Film
